heading: Certified copies of records
label: 9 Certified copies of records
text: The Director may furnish certified copies of specifications and drawings of patents issued by the Patent and Trademark Office, and of other records available either to the public or to the person applying therefor.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on Title 35, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 14 ( (part), , 940).Mar. 3, 1891, ch. 541, § 126 Stat. 908Reference to other records is added. The fee for certification is omitted as it appears in the table of fees.
Prior ProvisionsA prior section 9 was renumbered .section 8 of this title
